overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Watch Dogs: Legion) showing a character walking along the Thames riverside in London. The character descends from an upper walkway past historic stone architecture, continues along the embankment with views of the modern skyline including The Shard, and wades into the river water.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic riverside walkway under bridge approach

events.description: character descends stone stairs from upper walkway to lower riverside path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down stone stairs toward the river embankment, wearing a green jacket and beanie

entered.detail: large historic stone bridge with archway spanning the river
tall historic stone wall with weathered texture
wide river visible through the bridge arch with boats on the water
modern glass skyscrapers including The Shard visible in the distance
wide stone steps descending between stone walls

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an upper wooden walkway adjacent to a historic stone bridge. The character descends a wide stone staircase between weathered stone walls, with the London skyline and River Thames visible through the bridge arch ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open riverside promenade with city views

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved riverside path with the stone balustrade on the right and embankment wall on the left

entered.detail: ornate stone railing along the river edge with decorative pillars
distinctive curved glass building resembling London City Hall
tall black lamppost with circular top

segments.scene_description: Walking along the lower riverside promenade with panoramic views of the Thames and the London skyline. The curved glass building of City Hall is visible across the river on the left, while ornate stone balustrades line the water's edge.

events.description: character steps off the stone steps and enters the river water, creating splashes

agents.ego_description: wading into the Thames river, water rising from ankles to waist as the character moves deeper

entered.detail: weathered wooden post sticking out of the water near the shore
bridge structure visible in the distance downriver

segments.scene_description: The character descends the water-access steps and enters the Thames, wading deeper into the river. The water level rises around the character as they move away from the embankment, with the London skyline still visible across the river and a wooden mooring post nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a historic elevated walkway down to the water's edge and finally into the River Thames. It begins on a wooden path adjacent to a stone bridge, moving down a wide staircase between weathered walls toward the river visible through a bridge arch. As the character reaches the lower promenade, the scene opens into a panoramic view of the London skyline, passing ornate stone balustrades with the curved glass of City Hall visible across the water. The camera then follows the character down the water-access steps and into the river, where the water level gradually rises around them as they wade away from the embankment. Finally, the movement continues deeper into the Thames, passing a wooden mooring post while the city skyline remains visible in the distance.
